rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Against Deposit
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 28, 2016 line 5. PLAINTIFF CHARLES LI's Motion To Enforce Against Deposit GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ZELTE CRAWFORD VS. HELEN CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 28, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT HELEN CHEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer under state and local law and is not uncertain. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: VLAD CHERNOGUS VS. SILVIA URRUTIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 28, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT JOSHUA URRUTIA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED as to paragraph 17(e) with 5-day leave to amend for plaintiff to amend the prayer re: forfeiture. To the extent the Defendant is seeking to strike the complaint (Reply 3:10-13) the motion is DENIED. = (501/LOT)
